productDisplayName: Converse Women Red Big Checks Shoes
description: CompositionRed, black check patterned unisex lace-up shoes made with canvas uppers and rubber outsolesshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterThese funky red and black check patterned shoes from converse come in a classic Oxford design with durable canvas uppers, black canvas lining and cushioned footbed for hours of uniterrupted style and comfort. The white lace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug Fit while the original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection. The multi directional outsole gives added grip. Perfect for urban wear.
